case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. JESSICA K POISSON et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-22-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
